stories.title: Lamine Yamal vs. Lionel Messi: Contender vs. legen...
stories.summary: When Lionel Messi and Lamine Yamal meet in Sunday's World Cup final, will the veteran magician from Argentina retain his place as the GOAT, or will Spain's young star step up?

stories.title: Back to his Ballon d'Or-winning best, Rodri has po...
stories.summary: Other Spain players get the attention, but midfielder Rodri is the key to them stopping Lionel Messi and Argentina.

stories.title: Burns holds Open lead; Fox, Kim two shots back
stories.summary: Two weeks after the birth of his daughter, Sam Burns finds himself atop the Open Championship leaderboard with a two-shot lead heading into Sunday's final round at Royal Birkdale.

stories.title: Brondello regrets Reese comment, apologizes
stories.summary: Tempo coach Sandy Brondello apologized to Angel Reese after being heard referring to Reese with a phrase that sounded like "protected species" to officials during a game Friday.

stories.title: UK's Kerr smashes 27-year-old men's mile record
stories.summary: British runner Josh Kerr broke the long-standing men's mile world record at a Diamond League meet in London on Saturday in a time of 3 minutes, 42.66 seconds.
